title: カワイイライブの後で……♪

text_block_list.text: That day, at the winning concert...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Everyone! Thanks for your support! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I got to be in the center today! ♪ What'd you
think?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Cute Curren Chan!
It was so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm...
Whisper, whisper...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Is that it?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Do you... really love me?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: You're so cuuute!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
We love you!
We love you, Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha, thank you! As for how I feel...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Nah, I'm not telling! ♪

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Awwwww!
On the way home...

text_block_list.name: Curren Fans
text_block_list.text:
Cute Curren Chan!
Cute Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehe! Maybe I got them too obsessed. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That's what happens when I'm in center! I wanted
them all to love me so much I ended up going
overboard. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It was a great sight, though... Seeing everyone
experience the power of cuteness.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'll just have to keep them loving me from
now on too! ♪

Curren Chan has taken yet another step closer to
mastering cuteness.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Everyooone! Thank youuu!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Who just called out to me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Was it you? Thank you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Kyaaa!
On the way home...

text_block_list.name: Curren Fan A
text_block_list.text: Oh! It's Curren Chan! Y-you're so cute!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hello. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I saw the winning concert today! Um, y-your voice
is so cute!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehe! It makes me so happy to hear that. ♪ Thank
you!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But... sorry I wasn't standing in the center today.

text_block_list.name: Curren Fan A
text_block_list.text:
It's okay! I'm just glad I got to hear so many
songs! I love your concerts!

text_block_list.name: Curren Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You were in the center in our hearts! You were so
cute!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you. That makes me happier than you
know.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Next time I'll make sure I'm in the center at the
winning concert and give you an even better
performance!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You'll definitely be saying how cute I am!

text_block_list.name: Curren Fans
text_block_list.text: C-c... Cute Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Good answer! ♪ I hope you'll keep cheering for
me. ♪

After hearing the voices of her fans, Curren Chan
is determined to be in the center for the next
concert.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thanks, everyone! ♪
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Hmmm.
On the way home...

text_block_list.name: Race Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Oh! Are you... Curren Chan?

text_block_list.name: Race Spectator A
text_block_list.text: I saw your concert today! You were so cute!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thank you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Race Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to see you sing in the center next time!
Keep up the hard work!

text_block_list.name: Race Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Curren Chan?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: If I sing in the center... will you like me?

text_block_list.name: Race Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Uh, um... Y-yeah! Okay... Bye!

text_block_list.name: Race Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Wh-what was that?! She's so cute, it's scary!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Looks like I went a little too far...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Nooothing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But now I know my next goal. I have to get even
cuter!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll make them love me so much, they'll never be
able to get away.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So... where should I start? ♪

Curren Chan seems to be feeling some level of
dissatisfaction. I guess she hasn't reached her
ideal cuteness yet...
